content.en:
Who of the eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords will enter?

At the moment, they were deliberating.

At this moment, Ye Tian said, "Let me go in, there is still a clone in my body." "

As he spoke, Ye Tian's second replica body appeared.

This second copy body is naturally what he has just condensed, anyway, the cost of his copy body condensation is very small, and for him now, that price is almost negligible.

The eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords didn't dare to take the risk, so he went in and explored.

"Endless Lord, you want to go in?"

The Frostless Lord was a little surprised.

Ye Tian explained: "My doppelganger is a bit special, and the price to pay is not big. "

Seeing Ye Tian say this, the other half-step Legendary Realm lords agreed.

Wow!

Ye Tian's copy body shuttled into the Time Constant Gold Vein, and as soon as he entered here, the power of time was eroding him.

However, Ye Tian's life-saving ability is still very strong, so he will not fall so easily.

At the moment, the outside world.

Ye Tian's other copy body projected the situation in the Time Constant Gold Vein almost at the same time, allowing the eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords to watch.

Thorough!

Thorough!

Soon, Ye Tian had gone a long way in, and for a long time, Heng Gold Mine 130 was also presented in front of the eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

"This vein contains a lot of time constant gold!"

The Frostless Lord said excitedly.

The other half-step Legendary Realm Lords were also very happy, so much time Hengjin was enough to build a bridge of time in the True Saintless Land, and there was even extra time Hengjin, which could support it for a long time.

Originally, Ye Tian and the eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords were quite happy.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian saw a long river of disillusionment and disillusionment, like a dream.

He was greeted by a pair of huge pupils, as if two worlds were staring at him.

These pupils belonged to an unimaginably large Purple Aurora Beast.

And his arrival seems to have caused something to change.

In an instant, a terrifying force erupted, directly annihilating his body.

This power stretched out, causing the Frostless Lord and the others in the outside world to change their expressions.

"Let's go!"

The Frostless Lord took Ye Tian away, and the other half-step Legendary Realm Lords also retreated quickly, but there was still a lack of aftermath impact, directly injuring the eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

However, Ye Tian's replica body was only injured and did not fall, thanks to the support of the Frostless Lord

Outside the Purple Continent.

The eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords, including the Frostless Lord, had palpitations.

"Lord Wuhu, what just happened?"

The Frostless Lord hurriedly asked.

Ye Tian frowned and said: "I seem to see a purple aurora beast that is far larger than other purple aurora beasts, half of its body seems to be in a long time, half of its body seems to be in a special space, and it has a pair of pupils, but I don't feel any life from it, it should be a corpse." "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian described the specific picture he saw, without missing a little.

But when he tried to conjure up this picture, it just collapsed.

"Endless Lord, that kind of picture can't be painted, it should have violated the taboo secret of time and space. And we guessed that the Purple Aurora Beast should be a Legendary Realm Lord billion"

The Frostless Lord guessed.

"What, Legendary Realm Lord!"

Although Ye Tian had some guesses, he was still very surprised when he was confirmed by the Frostless Lord.

"We know very little about the Legendary Realm Lords, and the situation here is a bit special, and we must report it to the Legendary Realm Lords. "

The Frostless Lord decided.

-------------------

There is no holy place.

The Lord of Frost has come to visit the Lord of the Legendary Realm, the Lord of the Dragon Gu.

At present, the most active person in the True Void Holy Land is the Dragon Gu Lord.

"Wushuang, what are you looking for me?"

Lord Dragongu asked.

"We've found the time-constant gold vein!@无霜领主说道.

?? Oh, I've found the Time Constant Gold Vein, I'm lucky, what is the yield, if it's enough to build the Bridge of Time, I'll help you build it. You're not here for me to help build the Bridge of Time, are you?" said Lord Dragongu.

"Not really!" "This time constant gold vein has a lot of production, but there is a special situation, we found the corpse of a legendary realm lord inside, and it is a purple aurora beast. Half of its body seemed to be in the long river of time, and half of it was in a special space, and the detonating aura impact hit us half-step Legendary Realm Lords, and this Legendary Realm Lord was estimated to be extremely terrifying among the Legendary Realm Lords, otherwise he would not have such power after death. "

"Legendary Realm Lord, Purple Aurora Beast!"

Lord Longgu looked solemn, thinking about something.

"Let's go, let's talk about the location, I'll go over. @龙古领主道.

"Yes!"

The Frostless Lord told the location of the Purple Continent.

After Lord Longgu knew the location, he stepped into the river of time, walked in the river of time step by step, and soon walked out of the river of time.

And this time I walked out, and I came directly to the Purple Continent.

......

"I've seen Lord Longgu!"

The eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords said respectfully.

And Ye Tian also shouted.

"Right here, huh?"

Lord Longgu muttered.

"Yes, right there!"

The Frostless Lord pointed to the location.

"I feel it, let's go together, I'll protect you, don't worry. "Lord Longgu said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian and the Frostless Lord and the other eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords followed the Dragon Gu Lord into the Time Constant Gold Passage.

Unlike the last time he came in, this time Ye Tian didn't feel any suppression, as if this place had suddenly become safe.

But he knew very well that this was all because the Dragon Gu Lord had endured the suppression and erosion here with his own strength.

Soon, everyone came to the depths of the Time Constant Gold Vein.

"This time constant gold vein is very good, enough to build a time bridge, and it can last for a long time, I will directly bring this vein back to the True No Holy Land, otherwise if it is mined slowly, other forces are afraid that they will come to snatch it." Lord Longgu said.

"Just follow the advice of the Dragon Gu Lord," the Frostless Lord and the other half-step Legendary Realm Lord nodded.

Finally.

Everyone came to the place where Ye Tian's previous copy body was annihilated.

Here, everyone saw the corpse of the Purple Aurora Beast.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying power attacked, but was blocked by the Dragon Ancient Lord, and everyone only saw the endless space-time storm colliding, but they did not feel any danger.

"It's really the corpse of the Lord of the Legendary Realm!

Frostless Lord, Umeng Lord, they were shocked.

At this time, Lord Longgu sighed, "It's really him!"
